positive: A highly stylized, minimalist abstract scene featuring a cluster of diverse bioluminescent flora and fauna – whimsical forest spirits, glowing mushrooms, stylized moths, and celestial elements. The style should be a blend of Art Deco and modern botanical illustration, rendered with crisp lines and deep, rich jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple, gold accent). Focus on creating a strong, dark silhouette against bursts of vibrant, glowing light, emphasizing high contrast and clean separation of elements. Composition must be perfectly centered and balanced for a repeating print pattern, suitable for wearable art. The artwork should have a high degree of graphic clarity and depth, appearing printed directly onto a fabric surface.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, trademark, jpeg artifacts, lowres, grainy, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, photorealism, cartoonish, messy lines
